summary: Pipeline Hero 2-Tier System - All tests pass. Backend: 16/16 tests (100%). Frontend: All elements rendered correctly. The new 2-tier hero system replaces the old single carousel with Tier 1 'Needs Attention Now' (urgent) and Tier 2 'Keep Momentum Going' (momentum), with on_track items shown as calm summary.
critical_code_review_comments: PipelineHero.js correctly classifies actions into urgent (coach_flag, director_action, past_due, reply_needed, due_today) and momentum (cooling_off, first_outreach) categories
HeroSection.js implements horizontal scroll with snap behavior and navigation arrows that appear only when scrollable
HeroCard.js uses left accent border for urgency signal - red (#ef4444) for urgent, indigo (#6366f1) for momentum
On-track items are excluded from hero and shown as count summary with green checkmark
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline Hero 2-tier system is complete. Key data-testid attributes: pipeline-hero, pipeline-hero-title, pipeline-hero-summary, hero-section-urgent, hero-section-momentum, hero-card-{id}, hero-card-cta-{id}, hero-no-urgent, hero-on-track-summary, hero-dot-urgent, hero-dot-momentum, hero-count-urgent, hero-count-momentum. Test data: 1 urgent (University of Florida - coach_assigned_action), 2 momentum (Stanford, UCLA - cooling_off), 4 on-track.

verified_requirements.pipeline_page_loads: ✅ PASS - Page loads without errors after login
verified_requirements.2_tier_hero_structure: ✅ PASS - PipelineHero → HeroSection × 2 → HeroCard structure correct
verified_requirements.tier1_needs_attention_now: ✅ PASS - Shows only urgent category items (coach_flag in test data)
verified_requirements.tier2_keep_momentum_going: ✅ PASS - Shows only momentum category items (cooling_off)
verified_requirements.on_track_summary: ✅ PASS - Shows '4 programs on track — no action needed' with green checkmark
verified_requirements.hero_card_elements: ✅ PASS - Logo, name, match %, division/stage, explanation, owner label, CTA button all present
verified_requirements.urgent_card_styling: ✅ PASS - Red left accent border, solid CTA button ('Take Action')
verified_requirements.momentum_card_styling: ✅ PASS - Indigo left accent border, outline CTA button ('Re-engage')
verified_requirements.header_summary_line: ✅ PASS - Shows '1 need attention · 2 losing momentum · 4 on track'
verified_requirements.navigation_arrows: ✅ PASS - Scroll arrows present for horizontal navigation
verified_requirements.kanban_board_renders: ✅ PASS - Kanban board visible below hero sections
